title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: If you are watching this video, your healthcare provider has asked you or someone you know

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: to get a blood test to measure your cholesterol levels.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: The National Institutes of Health cholesterol treatment guidelines recommend you have a blood

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: test every five years if you are twenty years or older.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: The test, called a fasting lipoprotein profile, measures your levels of total cholesterol

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: LDL, also known as bad cholesterol HDL, also known as good cholesterol

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: and a type of fat in your blood called triglycerides.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: During this test, a blood sample will be taken after you have not eaten for nine to twelve

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: hours.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: Helping is important to ensure accurate results for this test.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: The total cholesterol goal should be less than 200mg per deciliter.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: For most people, an ideal HDL or good cholesterol should be 60 or higher.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: An ideal LDL or bad cholesterol should be less than 100.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: And fasting triglycerides should be less than 150.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: If you have high blood cholesterol levels, you have a greater risk of heart disease.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: In heart disease, blood vessels called coronary arteries become narrowed or blocked by a

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: waxy substance containing cholesterol, called plaque.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: For time, plaque may reduce or block the flow of oxygen-rich blood to your heart muscle

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: and cause a heart attack.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: There are many known risk factors for heart disease.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: Risk factors you can control include high blood cholesterol and triglycerides, high blood

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: pressure, diabetes, pre-diabetes, being overweight or obese.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: Smoking, lack of physical activity, an unhealthy diet, and stress.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: Risk factors you can't control include age, gender, and having a family history of heart

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: disease.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: If you already have heart disease and multiple or severe risk factors, your doctor may lower

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: your LDL goal to less than 70.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: Your specific goals may vary depending on your health situation.

title: ANH16169 Blood Test for Cholesterol
text_en: Risk your doctor what your lipid goals should be.

file: ANH16170_How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed.mp4
title: ANH16170 How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed
text_en: A healthcare professional can measure your blood pressure to find out if you have high blood pressure.

file: ANH16170_How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed.mp4
title: ANH16170 How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed
text_en: This video will help you understand what the numbers in your blood pressure mean.

file: ANH16170_How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed.mp4
title: ANH16170 How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed
text_en: Your blood pressure can be measured with a blood pressure cuff called a sphigmomanometer.

file: ANH16170_How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed.mp4
title: ANH16170 How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed
text_en: When your heart beats, the pressure of blood on the walls of your arteries is called systolic pressure.

file: ANH16170_How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed.mp4
title: ANH16170 How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed
text_en: When your heart relaxes between beats, pressure on the artery wall is called diastolic pressure.

file: ANH16170_How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed.mp4
title: ANH16170 How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed
text_en: Your blood pressure may change throughout the day.

file: ANH16170_How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed.mp4
title: ANH16170 How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed
text_en: However, optimal systolic pressure should be less than 120 and optimal diastolic pressure should be less than 80.

file: ANH16170_How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed.mp4
title: ANH16170 How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed
text_en: If your systolic pressure frequently stays above 130 or your diastolic pressure frequently stays above 80, you have high blood pressure.

file: ANH16170_How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed.mp4
title: ANH16170 How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed
text_en: Your specific goals may vary depending on your health situation.

file: ANH16170_How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed.mp4
title: ANH16170 How High Blood Pressure Is Diagnosed
text_en: Ask your doctor what your blood pressure goals should be.
